args.sql:
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(ST_Collect(omrade))) AS bbox_wkt
FROM flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
GROUP BY objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_SRID(omrade)
LIMIT 5;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(omrade) AS omrade_wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT DISTINCT bygningsstatus
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningid, bygningsstatus, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND bygningsstatus = 'FA'
LIMIT 100;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and SRID

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons within the Drammen municipality extent (requires WKT from step 1)

3.description: get buildings in Drammen with status FA and their geometry

4.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per building (group by bygningid and keep attributes)

args.sql:
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsText(omrade) AS omrade_wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('SRID=25833;POLYGON EMPTY'), 25833)) = FALSE
LIMIT 5;

WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_GeomFromText('SRID=25833;POLYGON EMPTY'), 25833)) = FALSE
LIMIT 5;

2.sql:
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
LIMIT 100;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry by name

3.description: get buildings in Drammen with status FA

4.description: reduce flood areas to Drammen extent (intersect with municipality geometry)

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood areas

6.description: one row per building (group by bygningid)
